title: 2-Pack Extinguishing Ashtray Car Butt Bucket Cigarette Ashtray Glow in the Dark for – Smoke Odor Reducer | Fits Cup Holders | Self-Extinguishing Design | Portable No-Mess Ash Tray for Car, Home
features: *** Glow-in-the-Dark Design *** – The top rim glows at night, making it easy to find in the dark while driving. Perfect for long trips and night-time use.
*** 2-Pack Better Value *** – Keep one in the car and one at home, or use in two vehicles. Great for personal use or as a practical gift.
*** Size – 8 × 8 × 10 cm *** – Fits perfectly into most standard UK/EU cup holders. Easy to place in cars, vans, trucks, lorries, taxis and even on desks at home.
*** Reduces Smoke Odor *** – Deep container traps ash and reduces lingering smells inside the vehicle. Helps keep the interior fresh.
*** Self-Extinguishing & No-Mess *** – Narrow top funnels ash down and helps extinguish cigarettes quickly. Minimises ash scatter and keeps surfaces clean.
description: This 2-Pack Glow in the Dark Cigarette Butt Bucket Ashtray is compact and convenient, measuring 8 cm (L) × 8 cm (W) × 10 cm (H). The size fits most standard cup holders in UK and EU vehicles, making it ideal for cars, vans, trucks, lorries and taxis. The glow-in-the-dark rim makes it easy to find during night drives, while the deep bucket design helps reduce smoke odour and keeps ash contained. The self-extinguishing top funnels smoke downwards and helps put out cigarettes faster, reducing mess and improving safety. Ideal for smokers who want a cleaner environment and a simple way to manage ash without spreading dust around the car. Durable, portable, and easy to empty — a practical accessory for any vehicle. glow in the dark ashtray car ashtray cup holder butt bucket car cigarette ash tray car odor reducing ashtray smoke bucket car smoker accessories portable car ashtray
